_comment: OFFICIAL RESULTS — edit by hand as games finish. For each match, set the value to the side that WON: "a" = top team in that match, "b" = bottom team (the same a/b sides shown on the bracket page). Leave null until the match is played. Match ids are grouped by round below. Match 103 is the THIRD-PLACE game: it is not worth points, but its result breaks ties on the leaderboard (whoever predicted it correctly ranks higher). On commit, the leaderboard workflow re-scores everyone and updates wc2026/leaderboard.json with a fresh timestamp.
